title: helenium dichotomum
intro: Helenium dichotomum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique, forked stem. Traditionally, Sneezeweed has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis, bronchitis, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Sneezeweed include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Sneezeweed can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a powder or salve.
